message:
fix(connectors): implement secret redaction in Debug output and harden URL path validation

Security hardening across multiple connectors to prevent accidental
credential exposure in logs and strengthen input validation:

Secret redaction (6 connectors):
- brave-search, deepgram, elevenlabs, exa, mistral, tavily: Replace
  derived Debug on Auth, Config, and Client structs with custom impls
  that redact ApiKey values as "[REDACTED]" while preserving other
  fields (credential IDs, URLs, timeouts) for debugging

Outlook connector hardening:
- client.rs: Rename sanitize_id() to encode_path_segment() with a
  fundamentally stronger approach — proactively URL-encode all
  non-alphanumeric characters via percent-encoding crate instead of
  pattern-based rejection. Add empty/whitespace and control character
  detection. Fix error masking: replace unwrap_or_else fallback with
  proper error propagation via ?
- connector.rs: Refactor parse_top() to return FcpResult<Option<u32>>
  with explicit rejection of non-numeric, zero, and out-of-range values.
  Add parse_string_array() helper for sanitizing email recipient lists
  with empty-entry validation
- error.rs: Add HTTP 408 to retryable status codes, refactor is_retryable
  to use explicit logic instead of const pattern matching
- Cargo.toml: Add percent-encoding dependency

QQ connector:
- client.rs: Add %2e (URL-encoded dot) detection to path traversal check

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -33,6 +33,7 @@ sha2.workspace = true
 thiserror.workspace = true
 tracing.workspace = true
 tracing-subscriber = { workspace = true, features = ["env-filter", "json"] }
+percent-encoding.workspace = true
 url.workspace = true
 uuid.workspace = true
 hex.workspace = true

@@ -277,6 +277,7 @@ pub fn sanitize_path_segment<'a>(value: &'a str, field: &str) -> QqResult<&'a st
         || value.contains("..")
         || lower.contains("%2f")
         || lower.contains("%5c")
+        || lower.contains("%2e")
     {
         return Err(QqError::InvalidInput(format!(
             "{field} contains path traversal characters"
